toolSpec.name: create_support_case
toolSpec.description: Create a new AWS Support case.

subject.description: The subject of the support case

service_code.description: The code for the AWS service. Use describe_services get valid codes.

category_code.description: The category code for the issue. Use describe_services to get valid codes.

severity_code.description: The severity code for the issue. Use describe_severity_levels to get valid codes.

communication_body.description: The initial communication for the case

cc_email_addresses.description: Email addresses to CC on the case

language.description: The language of the case (ISO 639-1 code)

issue_type.description: The type of issue: technical, account-and-billing, or service-limit

attachment_set_id.description: The ID of the attachment set

case_id_list.description: List of case IDs to retrieve

display_id.description: The display ID of the case

after_time.description: The start date for a filtered date search (ISO 8601 format)

before_time.description: The end date for a filtered date search (ISO 8601 format)

include_resolved_cases.description: Include resolved cases in the results

language.description: The language of the case (ISO 639-1 code)

max_results.description: The maximum number of results to return

format.description: The format of the response (json or markdown)

toolSpec.name: describe_severity_levels
toolSpec.description: Retrieve information about AWS Support severity levels. This tool provides details about the available severity levels for AWS Support cases, including their codes and descriptions.

format.description: The format of the response in markdown or json

toolSpec.name: add_communication_to_case
toolSpec.description: Add communication to a support case.

case_id.description: The ID of the support case

cc_email_addresses.description: Email addresses to CC on the communication

attachment_set_id.description: The ID of the attachment set

case_id.description: The ID of the support case

toolSpec.name: describe_services
toolSpec.description: Retrieve information about AWS services available for support cases.

service_code_list.description: Optional list of service codes to filter results

language.description: The language code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'ja' for Japanese)

format.description: The format of the response (json or markdown)
